:::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
![Class-level bridge from `OpalElement` to the runtime `ElementBase` hierarchy.](figures/opal-element-class-bridge.png){fig-alt="TikZ preview of the OpalElement class bridge." width="85%"}
::::

:::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
```{=latex}
\begin{figure}
\centering
\resizebox{0.82\linewidth}{!}{\input{sections/sandbox/figures/tikz/opal-element-class-bridge.tikz.tex}}
\caption{Class-level bridge from \texttt{OpalElement} to the runtime \texttt{ElementBase} hierarchy.}
\end{figure}
```
::::
